title: Miconia juliansteyermarkii
taxonomy: Miconia juliansteyermarkii belongs to the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome or memecylid family. This family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Miconia juliansteyermarkii is a species within the Miconia genus, a large and diverse group of plants that are characterized by their showy flowers and often epiphytic habits. The Miconia genus is further classified into several subgenera, with Miconia juliansteyermarkii belonging to a particular subgenus within the genus. The classification of Miconia juliansteyermarkii reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Melastomataceae family.
